channel.title: Repos on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Repos on Arrans github.io

item.title: arrans_overlay
item.description: Arrans Gentoo Overlay

item.title: kjules
item.description: A C++ application built with KDE Frameworks that provides a desktop interface for interacting with the Google Jules API

item.title: kgithub-notify
item.description: A sleek GitHub notification system tray application written natively in C++ using Qt6 and KDE Frameworks 6 (KF6). It quietly monitors your GitHub account, notifying you when there are new notifications, and provides a rich desktop interface to manage themGithub notifier for KDE

item.title: arran4
item.description: Github Profile landing page github repo

item.title: KMagMux
item.description: Torrent and Magent file and protocol handler for routing to programs / services

item.title: arran4.github.io
item.description: A nausiatingly personal github page.

item.title: idea-txtar-support-plugin
item.description: Jetbrains Idea txtar support plugin

item.title: gobookmarks
item.description: Landing page for when you open browsers / live bookmarks in go.

item.title: arrans_overlay_workflow_builder
item.description: A gentoo overlay ebuild workflow builder generator for -bin with a special purpose handler for .appimage binary files

item.title: dotfiles
item.description: Just a collection of dotfiles managed by Chezmoi

item.title: homebrew-tap
item.description: My homebrew tap semiautomated.. maybe?

item.title: g2
item.description: g2 Gentoo Tools

item.title: golang-ical
item.description: A ICS / ICal parser and serialiser for Golang.

item.title: gocdm
item.description: Console Display Manager (go port)

item.title: lxa
item.description: ls with extended attributes

item.title: gorillas-react
item.description: Generated gorillas in react

item.title: go-dynamic-content
item.description: Lazy or weak file content

item.title: fork-marknote
item.description: A simple markdown note management app

item.title: blog
item.description: Github pages blog

item.title: golang-wordwrap
item.description: Wordwrap library for golang images.

item.title: gentoo-packages
item.description: Gentoo packages

item.title: heatplot
item.description: This program takes a formula and plots the “heat” for any particular location

item.title: abc-justin-rss
item.description: ABC news just-in to rss converter - generated

item.title: phonenumber
item.description: A generator for the nokia phone keyboard meme

item.title: phpbb2-rss
item.description: RSS generator for any phpbb2 forum

item.title: awesome-fodmap-resources

item.title: awesome-terminal-multiplexers
item.description: Simple awesome list of terminal multiplexers

item.title: image-formula-find
item.description: Experimenting with genetic algorithms

item.title: goa4web
item.description: My everything website (server) from 2005 ported from C to GO. Ready for news, forums, link sharing, image sharing and more

item.title: eightbyeight
item.description: golang based dithering experiments

item.title: golang-frame
item.description: A simple golang image frame drawing library (Draws a frame around something.)

item.title: git-tag-inc
item.description: Yet another semantic version incrementor and tagger for git

item.title: sentencestats
item.description: Tools to plot character usage in sentences

item.title: golang-rpg-textbox
item.description: Golang image library to Renders a RPG style text box with word wrapped text of your choosing

item.title: rotatingcircles
item.description: Generates an optical illusion: Rotating circles

item.title: pimtrace
item.description: A CLI tool for preforming queries on ical, maildir, mbox and csv files

item.title: matchStickProblem
item.description: Generates an image of solving the “match stick problem” (move a match stick) for amusement

item.title: git-tag-inc-action
item.description: An action for incrementing semantic git tags

item.title: golang-rcs
item.description: golang rcs parser / generator, and utilities

item.title: tex_recipes_template
item.description: A very simple tex engine for recipes helpful for an AI world

item.title: g2-action
item.description: g2 github workflow action

item.title: fork-cef
item.description: Chromium Embedded Framework (CEF). A simple framework for embedding Chromium-based browsers in other applications.

item.title: tsobjectutils
item.description: Some typescript objects I use in a couple repos

item.description: 🎧 mpris media player command-line controller for vlc, mpv, RhythmBox, web browsers, cmus, mpd, spotify and others.

item.description: Extremely fast, easy to use, and fully async NoSQL database for Flutter

item.title: system_windows

item.title: fork-qip
item.description: Pockets of speed safely sewn together

item.title: mvcommon
item.description: Tool for moving files into a folder where they have a common prefix

item.title: mostcomm
item.description: A cli utility for finding the most common and sorting by length, lines-sets in a text file

item.title: rntocase
item.description: Some utilities to rename files, to upper, lower, title, camel, kebab, darwin case and many more

item.title: fontlengths
item.description: Font lengths tester by generating pngs of each font and sorting by length automatically

item.title: podcast-cdr-manager
item.description: CLI tool to help manage podcast subscriptions for burning to CDROMs / CDR / CDRW

item.title: golang-diff

item.title: dart-udt
item.description: AI port of UDT library from source forge to Dart

item.title: Dimension
item.description: (Beta) Peer-to-peer group chat and file transfer.

item.title: strings2
item.description: Some golang string helper functions focused around case transformation but other things in the future.

item.title: dart_unix_single_instance
item.description: A library which uses unix sockets to ensure a single instance

item.title: comic-mono-font
item.description: A legible monospace font… the very typeface you’ve been trained to recognize since childhood
